name: Apex Outdoor Gear
description: Apex Outdoor Gear is a leading retail chain specializing in premium camping, hiking, and mountaineering equipment, with 12 stores across the Pacific Northwest and an active e-commerce presence.

name: Bella Cosmetic Boutiques
description: A luxury beauty boutique chain with 45 retail locations across California and Texas. Bella specializes in organic, vegan, and premium skincare products for modern consumers.

name: GreenLife Grocery Market
description: GreenLife is a regional organic grocery chain with 18 locations in the Midwest. We focus on farm-to-table fresh produce, organic bulk goods, and eco-friendly home items.

name: Nova Tech Retailers
description: Specialty electronics stores in major metropolitan areas, offering premium smart home devices, boutique audio equipment, and custom gaming PCs.
